message: I've been thinking about how heat waves kind of sneak up on you—one day it's warm, the next day your AC is working overtime and you're worried about the whole family staying comfortable and safe. I found this straightforward resource that walks through the practical stuff: how to recognize heat exhaustion, what to keep on hand, and how to help neighbors who might be more vulnerable. Nothing scary, just solid information that makes me feel more prepared. Do you have a go-to way you keep your family cool during really hot spells?
